title: Causal Decoders & Cross-Attention
content:
# Causal Decoders & Cross-Attention

## 1. Causal Masking
$$\mathbf{M}_{ij} = \begin{cases} 0 & \text{if } i \ge j \\ -\infty & \text{if } i < j \end{cases}$$
*   Forces decoder attention to be strictly autoregressive.

## 2. Cross-Attention Setup
*   Queries ($\mathbf{Q}$) projected from the decoder.
*   Keys ($\mathbf{K}$) and Values ($\mathbf{V}$) projected from the encoder.
